---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for the Universal Context Layer
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**Problem or use case**
Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case this feature would address.

**Proposed solution**
A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

**Open-core note**
This repository is the open-source core of the Universal Context Layer. Features that extend the core connector framework, selector engine, API surface, demo system, or SDKs are great candidates.

Features that involve multi-tenant billing, SSO/SCIM, enterprise connectors, or cloud control-plane management may belong in the commercial layer — the maintainers will advise during triage.

**Additional context**
Any other context, mockups, or references.
